name: ScoutSuite (Multi-Cloud Security Auditing)

auth.notes: Cloud provider credentials (AWS profile, GCP service account, Azure SP)

performance.notes: Reads cloud APIs; full scan 5-60 min depending on account size

agent_readiness.notes: Multi-cloud security auditing tool. python scout.py aws --profile prod. Generates HTML report with findings. Checks: IAM policies, public S3 buckets, security groups, encryption status, logging, MFA enforcement, resource exposure. Supports AWS, GCP, Azure, OCI, Alibaba Cloud, Kubernetes. HTML report with severity ratings. JSON output. Read-only (no changes made). Alternative to Prowler with multi-cloud support and better UI report.

gotchas: Python dependencies can conflict with other tools
Some checks outdated for newer cloud services
HTML report requires manual review (not easily automated)
Rate limiting from cloud APIs can slow scans
best_when: Multi-cloud environments needing single tool (AWS + GCP + Azure)
Cloud security assessments generating HTML reports for clients
avoid_when: Automated CI/CD pipeline (output not machine-readable by default)
summary: ScoutSuite is NCC Group's multi-cloud security auditing tool. python scout.py aws --profile. Generates HTML security report. Checks IAM, public S3, security groups, encryption, MFA, logging across AWS/GCP/Azure/OCI. Read-only. Good for cloud penetration testing engagements. Prowler for AWS-specific compliance; ScoutSuite for multi-cloud HTML reports.
